steps.title: Convert percentage to multiplier
steps.content: Interpret 118% of x as multiplying x by 1.18: $$f(x)=1.18x$$.

steps.title: Identify type of function
steps.content: This is a linear function of the form $y=mx+b$ with slope $m=1.18$ and intercept $b=0$. Since the slope is positive, the function increases as $x$ increases, so it is increasing linear. That confirms D is correct.
